text:
The high-peaked spires of Morvin cast dark shadows under the moonlight. The streets were empty, save for a single figure.

Desscaras sulked as she stalked through the darkness. This town was so dreary! Sure all the people were stuck inside hiding from the Majik that had appeared recently, but even full of people it was all grey bricks and roofs too steep to pose dramatically on. So she was stuck walking on the ground like a normie. She was the greatest witch in the world, she didn't deserve this!

The high-peaked spires of Morvin cast dark shadows under the moonlight. The streets were empty, save for a single figure.

Desscaras sulked as she stalked through the darkness. This town was so dreary! Sure all the people were stuck inside hiding from the Majik that had appeared recently, but even full of people it was all grey bricks and roofs too steep to pose dramatically on. So she was stuck walking on the ground like a normie. She was the greatest witch in the world, she didn't deserve this!
Desscaras continued through the streets of Morvin. The town remained quiet as people stayed indoors, afraid of the Majik that had recently appeared.
